add-red-rectangle-annotation-to-pdf-page.title: Add Red Rectangle Annotation to PDF Page
add-red-rectangle-annotation-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to place a red rectangle annotation with a 2 mm border thickness on a specific page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-highlight-annotation-to-pdf-page.title: Add Highlight Annotation to PDF Page
add-highlight-annotation-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to insert a yellow highlight annotation on page three of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

add-sticky-note-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Sticky Note Annotation to PDF
add-sticky-note-annotation-to-pdf.description: Shows how to bind a PDF, create a text (sticky note) annotation on the first page, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-bookmark-to-pdf-page.title: Add Bookmark to PDF Page
add-bookmark-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to create a bookmark titled "Project Overview" that navigates to page 5 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

create-nested-bookmarks-pdfcontenteditor.title: Create Nested Bookmarks with PdfContentEditor
create-nested-bookmarks-pdfcontenteditor.description: Shows how to generate a simple PDF and add a top‑level bookmark with nested section bookmarks using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

add-javascript-click-action-to-rectangle.title: Add JavaScript Click Action to Rectangle Annotation
add-javascript-click-action-to-rectangle.description: Demonstrates how to attach a JavaScript action to a rectangular link annotation in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

add-javascript-to-pdf-form-button.title: Add JavaScript to PDF Form Button for Total Calculation
add-javascript-to-pdf-form-button.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor to attach a JavaScript action to a push‑button in a PDF form that reads price and quantity fields, computes the total, and writes it back to a field.

extract-first-image-from-pdf-page.title: Extract First Image from PDF Page as PNG
extract-first-image-from-pdf-page.description: Shows how to extract the first image on page 2 of a PDF document and save it as a PNG file using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

extract-images-from-pdf.title: Extract Images from PDF using PdfExtractor
extract-images-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF file and save them to a designated folder using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor facade.

add-image-stamp-to-page-three.title: Add Image Stamp to Bottom‑Right of Page 3
add-image-stamp-to-page-three.description: Demonstrates how to place an image stamp (logo.png) at the bottom‑right corner of the third page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-confidential-text-stamp.title: Add Confidential Red Text Stamp with Transparency
add-confidential-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to place a red "Confidential" text stamp with 50 % opacity on every page of a PDF using Aspose.PDF.

reposition-stamp-on-page-four.title: Reposition Existing Stamp on Page Four
reposition-stamp-on-page-four.description: Demonstrates how to move an existing stamp on page 4 of a PDF to align with the left margin by 10 mm using Aspose.Pdf's content editor facade.

replace-text-in-pdf.title: Replace Text in PDF Using PdfContentEditor
replace-text-in-pdf.description: Shows how to replace every occurrence of a specific word in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

replace-text-with-uuid-on-pdf-page.title: Replace Text with UUID on Specific PDF Page
replace-text-with-uuid-on-pdf-page.description: Shows how to load a PDF, generate a UUID, and replace the case‑sensitive string "InvoiceNumber" on page 6 using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

set-viewer-preference-default-zoom.title: Set Viewer Preference and Default Zoom for PDF
set-viewer-preference-default-zoom.description: Demonstrates how to configure a PDF to use a single‑page continuous layout and apply a default 100 % zoom using Aspose.Pdf facades.

read-pdf-viewer-preferences-zoom.title: Read PDF Viewer Preferences and Zoom Settings
read-pdf-viewer-preferences-zoom.description: Demonstrates how to retrieve a PDF's viewer preferences such as page layout and the default zoom factor using Aspose.Pdf facades.

add-file-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add File Attachment to PDF Document
add-file-attachment-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to attach an external file (Terms.pdf) to an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor without creating an annotation.

remove-pdf-attachment.title: Remove PDF Attachment Using PdfContentEditor
remove-pdf-attachment.description: Shows how to delete a specific embedded file (attachment) from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

password-protect-pdf-disable-printing.title: Password Protect PDF and Disable Printing
password-protect-pdf-disable-printing.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF with user and owner passwords, set permissions to disable printing, and save the protected document using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-permissions-allow-copy-block-for.title: Set PDF Permissions to Allow Copying but Block Form Editing and Annotations
set-pdf-permissions-allow-copy-block-for.description: Shows how to create a PDF with a form field and apply security privileges that enable text copying while disabling form filling and annotation modifications using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

add-author-and-title-metadata-to-pdf.title: Add Author and Title Metadata to PDF
add-author-and-title-metadata-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to set the author and title metadata of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf by updating the document's Info dictionary and saving the file.

add-custom-project-schema-to-pdf-xmp-met.title: Add Custom Project Schema to PDF XMP Metadata
add-custom-project-schema-to-pdf-xmp-met.description: Demonstrates how to register a custom namespace and add project identifier and version fields to the XMP metadata of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

fill-acroform-text-field.title: Fill AcroForm Text Field with Aspose.Pdf.Facades
fill-acroform-text-field.description: Shows how to load a PDF form, fill the "CustomerName" text field with a value, and save the updated PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

check-pdf-checkbox-field.title: Check a PDF Checkbox Field Programmatically
check-pdf-checkbox-field.description: Shows how to load a PDF form, set the 'TermsAccepted' checkbox to true, and save the updated PDF using Aspose.Pdf Facade API.

select-radio-button-in-pdf-form.title: Select Radio Button Value in PDF Form
select-radio-button-in-pdf-form.description: Shows how to set a specific option of a radio button group in a PDF AcroForm using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

convert-pdf-page-to-high-res-png.title: Convert PDF Page to High‑Resolution PNG
convert-pdf-page-to-high-res-png.description: Shows how to extract page 7 from a PDF and save it as a 300 DPI PNG image using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff-lzw.title: Convert PDF to Multi‑Page TIFF with LZW Compression
convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff-lzw.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfConverter facade to transform a PDF document into a single multi‑page TIFF file while applying LZW compression.

convert-jpeg-to-pdf.title: Convert JPEG Image to PDF
convert-jpeg-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a JPEG file and embedding it into a single‑page PDF document with default margins using Aspose.Pdf.

print-pdf-multiple-copies-landscape.title: Print PDF with Multiple Copies and Landscape Orientation
print-pdf-multiple-copies-landscape.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfViewer and print it to the default printer using two copies and landscape page orientation.

batch-add-red-rectangle-annotation.title: Batch Add Red Rectangle Annotation to PDFs
batch-add-red-rectangle-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to loop through all PDF files in a folder, add a semi‑transparent red rectangle annotation to the first page of each document, and save the results to an output folder.

batch-replace-confidential-with-public.title: Batch Replace Text in PDF Files
batch-replace-confidential-with-public.description: Shows how to iterate through PDF files in a directory and use Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor to replace every occurrence of "Confidential" with "Public", saving the modified documents back to the original files.

batch-extract-images-from-pdfs.title: Batch Extract Images from PDFs to Subfolders
batch-extract-images-from-pdfs.description: Shows how to loop through a directory of PDF files, extract all images from each PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, and save them as JPEGs in individual subfolders.

batch-add-javascript-alert-to-rectangle-.title: Batch Add JavaScript Alert to Rectangle Annotations in PDFs
batch-add-javascript-alert-to-rectangle-.description: Iterates over PDF files in a directory, locates rectangle (square) annotations on each page, and attaches a JavaScript alert action to them using PdfContentEditor.

batch-set-pdf-viewer-preference-full-scr.title: Batch Set PDF Viewer Preference to Full‑Screen Mode
batch-set-pdf-viewer-preference-full-scr.description: Shows how to loop through all PDF files in a directory and set each document to open in full‑screen mode using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

batch-add-password-protection-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add Password Protection to PDFs
batch-add-password-protection-to-pdfs.description: Shows how to encrypt all PDF files in a folder with the same user password using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSecurity facade.

convert-pdf-pages-to-png-150-dpi.title: Convert PDF Pages to PNG Images at 150 DPI
convert-pdf-pages-to-png-150-dpi.description: Demonstrates batch conversion of each PDF page to a PNG image with 150 DPI resolution using Aspose.Pdf's PdfConverter.

batch-reposition-stamps-top-center.title: Batch Reposition Stamps to Top Center of PDF Pages
batch-reposition-stamps-top-center.description: Loads multiple PDF files, iterates through each page, retrieves existing stamps with PdfContentEditor, calculates coordinates to center them horizontally and align them to the top, moves the stamps, and saves the updated documents.

add-hyperlink-annotation-to-pdf-page.title: Add Hyperlink Annotation to PDF Page
add-hyperlink-annotation-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to insert a clickable web link annotation on a specific rectangle of page 2 in an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-javascript-calculation-to-pdf-form.title: Add JavaScript Calculation to PDF Form Field
add-javascript-calculation-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to attach a JavaScript OnCalculate action to a PDF form field with Aspose.Pdf, enabling automatic total computation from Quantity and UnitPrice fields.

extract-grayscale-images-from-pdf-page.title: Extract and Grayscale Images from PDF Page
extract-grayscale-images-from-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to extract images from a specific PDF page, convert each image to grayscale with System.Drawing, and save the results as JPEG files.

center-image-stamp-on-page.title: Center Image Stamp on Specific PDF Page
center-image-stamp-on-page.description: Shows how to add an image stamp and position it at the horizontal and vertical center of page 8 in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

replace-text-in-pdf-annotations.title: Replace Text in PDF Annotations on Selected Pages
replace-text-in-pdf-annotations.description: Shows how to locate text annotations in a PDF and replace their contents within a specified page range using Aspose.Pdf.

hide-toolbar-and-menu-bar.title: Hide Toolbar and Menu Bar Using Viewer Preferences
hide-toolbar-and-menu-bar.description: Demonstrates how to set PDF viewer preferences to hide the toolbar and menu bar when the document is opened in a viewer.

add-pdf-attachment-with-description.title: Add PDF Attachment with Description
add-pdf-attachment-with-description.description: Shows how to embed a PDF file as an attachment in another PDF using Aspose.Pdf and set a custom description for the attachment.

remove-attachments-old-pdf.title: Remove Attachments Ending with _old.pdf from PDF
remove-attachments-old-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to delete embedded file attachments whose names match a specific pattern (ending with "_old.pdf") using Aspose.Pdf Facade APIs.

encrypt-pdf-128-aes-restrict-permissions.title: Encrypt PDF with 128‑bit AES and Restrict Permissions
encrypt-pdf-128-aes-restrict-permissions.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using 128‑bit AES encryption and apply a privilege that forbids printing and editing using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-custom-xmp-metadata-projectid.title: Add Custom XMP Metadata (ProjectID) to PDF
add-custom-xmp-metadata-projectid.description: Demonstrates how to add a custom XMP metadata field named ProjectID with the value 12345 to a PDF and verify its presence using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-base64-image-stamp-to-pdf-page.title: Add Base64 Image Stamp to Specific PDF Page
add-base64-image-stamp-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to decode a Base64‑encoded image, create a Stamp, position it at 50 mm, and apply it to page 3 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-multiline-text-stamp.title: Add Multiline Text Stamp with Custom Font to PDF
add-multiline-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates creating a multiline text stamp, setting Arial 14 pt blue color, positioning it, and applying it to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

fill-pdf-form-fields-from-json.title: Fill PDF Form Fields from JSON using Aspose.Pdf Facades
fill-pdf-form-fields-from-json.description: Demonstrates how to import field values from a JSON file into a PDF form and save the filled document using Aspose.Pdf's Form facade.

convert-pdf-pages-to-transparent-png.title: Convert PDF Pages to Transparent PNG Images at 200 DPI
convert-pdf-pages-to-transparent-png.description: Demonstrates extracting pages 2‑4 from a PDF and saving each as a 200 DPI PNG with a transparent background using Aspose.Pdf.

silently-print-pdf-to-network-printer.title: Silently Print PDF to Network Printer
silently-print-pdf-to-network-printer.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and dispatch it to a network printer using a UNC path, suppressing all UI dialogs for silent printing.

add-dashed-rectangle-annotation-with-opa.title: Add Dashed Rectangle Annotation with Opacity to PDF Page
add-dashed-rectangle-annotation-with-opa.description: Demonstrates how to add a square (rectangle) annotation with a dashed border and 50% opacity to page six of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-page-open-javascript-log-page-number.title: Add Page‑Open JavaScript to Log Page Number
add-page-open-javascript-log-page-number.description: Shows how to attach a JavaScript action to each PDF page that logs the current page number when the page is opened, using Aspose.Pdf core API and the Facades library.

create-pdf-image-catalog.title: Create PDF Image Catalog with Thumbnails
create-pdf-image-catalog.description: Extracts all images from a source PDF and builds a new PDF that displays each image as a thumbnail with a caption, then cleans up temporary files.

align-stamp-with-paragraph-baseline.title: Align Stamp with Paragraph Baseline on Page 5
align-stamp-with-paragraph-baseline.description: The example extracts the baseline coordinates of the first paragraph on page 5 using a TextFragmentAbsorber, adds a text stamp, and then repositions the stamp so its baseline matches the paragraph baseline.

replace-dates-mmddyyyy-to-yyyymmdd.title: Replace MM/DD/YYYY Dates with YYYY-MM-DD in PDF
replace-dates-mmddyyyy-to-yyyymmdd.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to locate dates in MM/DD/YYYY format within a PDF and replace them with the ISO format YYYY-MM-DD using a regular expression.

set-pdf-viewer-preferences-thumbnails-fi.title: Set PDF Viewer Preferences: Thumbnails Pane and Fit Width
set-pdf-viewer-preferences-thumbnails-fi.description: Demonstrates how to use PdfContentEditor to configure viewer preferences so the PDF opens with the thumbnails pane visible and the window sized to fit the page width.

update-pdf-xmp-creator-metadata.title: Update PDF XMP Creator Metadata
update-pdf-xmp-creator-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to load existing XMP metadata from a PDF, modify the dc:creator field, and save the PDF with the updated metadata using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-encrypted-attachment-with-custom-des.title: Add Encrypted Attachment with Custom Description to PDF
add-encrypted-attachment-with-custom-des.description: Demonstrates adding a file attachment with a custom description to a PDF and then encrypting the PDF using AES‑256.

remove-all-bookmarks-from-pdf.title: Remove All Bookmarks from PDF
remove-all-bookmarks-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete every bookmark in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor facade and save the cleaned document.

create-nested-pdf-bookmarks-three-levels.title: Create Nested PDF Bookmarks (Three Levels)
create-nested-pdf-bookmarks-three-levels.description: Demonstrates how to add a three‑level bookmark hierarchy (section, subsections, sub‑subsections) to an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-underlined-yellow-text-stamp-to-pdf-.title: Add Underlined Yellow Text Stamp to PDF Page
add-underlined-yellow-text-stamp-to-pdf-.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, create a TextStamp with underline and a yellow background, center it, and place it on page 10.

add-rotated-image-stamp-with-opacity.title: Add Rotated Image Stamp with Opacity to PDF
add-rotated-image-stamp-with-opacity.description: Demonstrates how to place an image stamp on a PDF at specific coordinates, rotate it 45 degrees, and set its opacity to 80 % using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

populate-pdf-form-fields-from-json.title: Populate PDF Form Fields from JSON Configuration
populate-pdf-form-fields-from-json.description: Shows how to read default field values from a JSON file and use Aspose.Pdf to fill those values into a PDF form and save the result.

convert-pdf-pages-to-bmp.title: Convert PDF Pages to BMP Images
convert-pdf-pages-to-bmp.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfConverter facade to render each page of a PDF document as a 24‑bit BMP image suitable for legacy systems.

print-pdf-duplex-collated-copies.title: Print PDF with Duplex and Collated Copies
print-pdf-duplex-collated-copies.description: Demonstrates printing a PDF using Aspose.Pdf with duplex (double‑sided) mode enabled and collated multiple copies.

add-rectangle-annotation-light-gray.title: Add Rectangle Annotation with Light Gray Fill
add-rectangle-annotation-light-gray.description: Demonstrates how to add a rectangle (square‑circle) annotation to a PDF page using PdfContentEditor, setting a light gray fill color and a 1 pt border.

add-javascript-validation-to-pdf-form.title: Add JavaScript Validation to PDF Form Submit Button
add-javascript-validation-to-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to attach a JavaScript action to a PDF form button using Aspose.Pdf to validate required fields and display an alert when any are missing.

add-external-url-bookmark-to-pdf.title: Add External URL Bookmark to PDF
add-external-url-bookmark-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a bookmark in a PDF that opens an external website (URI action) using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

hide-scrollbars-disable-page-transitions.title: Hide Scrollbars and Disable Page Transitions in PDF
hide-scrollbars-disable-page-transitions.description: Shows how to set viewer preferences to hide UI elements such as scrollbars, toolbar and menubar, and how to remove page transition effects using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-pdf-viewer-preferences-to-json.title: Extract PDF Viewer Preferences and Save to JSON
extract-pdf-viewer-preferences-to-json.description: Demonstrates how to read viewer preference flags (page layout and zoom mode) from a PDF using PdfContentEditor and store them in a JSON configuration file.

add-attachment-set-moddate-pdf.title: Add Attachment and Set Modification Date in PDF
add-attachment-set-moddate-pdf.description: Shows how to attach a file to a PDF document and update its modification date to the current UTC timestamp for auditing purposes using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-specific-bookmark-from-pdf.title: Remove Specific Bookmark from PDF
remove-specific-bookmark-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete a bookmark with a given title from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfBookmarkEditor.

secure-pdf-with-certificate-encryption-a.title: Secure PDF with Certificate Encryption and Signature
secure-pdf-with-certificate-encryption-a.description: Demonstrates loading a public certificate to encrypt a PDF and applying a visible certification digital signature using a private certificate.

create-image-stamp-from-memory-stream.title: Create Image Stamp from Memory Stream
create-image-stamp-from-memory-stream.description: Shows how to generate an image in memory and apply it as a stamp to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf without saving the image to disk.

convert-pdf-to-progressive-jpeg-150-dpi.title: Convert PDF Pages to Progressive JPEG Images (150 DPI)
convert-pdf-to-progressive-jpeg-150-dpi.description: The example loads a PDF document, sets a 150 DPI resolution, and uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfConverter to export each page as a progressive JPEG image suitable for web use.

convert-png-to-multi-page-pdf.title: Convert PNG Images to Multi‑Page PDF
convert-png-to-multi-page-pdf.description: Shows how to create a one‑page PDF for each PNG image and then merge those pages into a single multi‑page PDF using Aspose.Pdf facades.

print-pdf-custom-page-ranges.title: Print PDF with Custom Page Ranges
print-pdf-custom-page-ranges.description: Shows how to print specific page ranges (1‑5 and 8‑10) of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfViewer and PrintDocumentWithSettings with custom printer and page settings.

add-file-attachment-annotation-opacity.title: Add File Attachment Annotation with Opacity to PDF Page
add-file-attachment-annotation-opacity.description: Demonstrates how to use PdfContentEditor to attach a file as an annotation on page 3 of a PDF and set its opacity to 0.6.

extract-images-from-pdf-pages.title: Extract Images from PDF Pages to PNG Files
extract-images-from-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to iterate through each page of a PDF, extract all embedded images, and save them as PNG files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

replace-text-preserve-font.title: Replace Text While Preserving Font in PDF
replace-text-preserve-font.description: Demonstrates how to replace a specific string in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor while keeping the original font style, size, and color, then saves the modified document.

add-file-attachment-data-relationship.title: Add File Attachment with Data Relationship to PDF
add-file-attachment-data-relationship.description: Demonstrates attaching a file to a PDF page using PdfContentEditor and setting the AFRelationship to Data for improved document organization.

add-xmp-metadata-corporate-branding.title: Add XMP Metadata for Corporate Branding to PDF
add-xmp-metadata-corporate-branding.description: Demonstrates how to embed custom XMP metadata such as a logo URL and brand color into an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfXmpMetadata facade.

add-right-aligned-multiline-text-stamp-p.title: Add Right-Aligned Multiline Text Stamp to Page 4
add-right-aligned-multiline-text-stamp-p.description: Demonstrates how to create a right-aligned multiline text stamp and place it at the bottom of the fourth page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-image-stamp-to-pdf-page.title: Add Image Stamp from URL to Specific PDF Page
add-image-stamp-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to download an image from an external URL and apply it as a stamp on page two of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

convert-pdf-to-png-thumbnails-300-dpi.title: Convert PDF Pages to PNG Thumbnails with 300 DPI and Transparent Background
convert-pdf-to-png-thumbnails-300-dpi.description: Shows how to load a PDF, set a 300 DPI resolution, enable transparent background, and render each page as a PNG image using Aspose.Pdf.

combine-jpeg-images-into-pdf.title: Combine JPEG Images into a PDF
combine-jpeg-images-into-pdf.description: Shows how to create a PDF document, add a separate page for each JPEG file, and place the image to fill the page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-rectangle-annotation-dash-opacity.title: Add Rectangle Annotation with Dash Pattern and Opacity
add-rectangle-annotation-dash-opacity.description: Shows how to place a rectangle (square) annotation on the first page of a PDF, apply a custom dash pattern to its border, and set 75% opacity using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-confirmation-dialog-to-pdf-submit-bu.title: Add Confirmation Dialog to PDF Submit Button
add-confirmation-dialog-to-pdf-submit-bu.description: Demonstrates how to add a submit button to a PDF form and attach JavaScript that shows a confirmation dialog before submitting the form using Aspose.Pdf Facade API.

add-help-bookmark-open-url.title: Add Help Bookmark with URL Action
add-help-bookmark-open-url.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF bookmark (outline) that opens an online documentation page when clicked, using Aspose.Pdf.

disable-zoom-controls-set-fixed-zoom.title: Disable Zoom Controls and Set Fixed Zoom Level in PDF
disable-zoom-controls-set-fixed-zoom.description: Demonstrates how to hide the PDF toolbar (which contains zoom controls) using viewer preferences and then enforce a fixed zoom level (100%) for consistent display.

add-file-attachment-with-creation-date.title: Add File Attachment with Creation Date to PDF
add-file-attachment-with-creation-date.description: Demonstrates attaching a PDF file to another PDF using PdfContentEditor and setting the attachment annotation's creation date to the current system time.

add-xmp-metadata-field-to-pdf.title: Add XMP Metadata Field to PDF
add-xmp-metadata-field-to-pdf.description: Shows how to bind a PDF, add a custom XMP metadata entry (Department: Finance), and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-red-bold-text-stamp-to-page-five.title: Add Red Bold Text Stamp to Specific PDF Page
add-red-bold-text-stamp-to-page-five.description: Demonstrates how to create a bold red text stamp, center it, and apply it only to page five of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-scaled-image-stamp-from-memory-strea.title: Add Scaled Image Stamp from Memory Stream to PDF
add-scaled-image-stamp-from-memory-strea.description: Loads an image into a MemoryStream, creates an ImageStamp, scales it to 50% using the Zoom property, positions it, and adds the stamp to every page of a PDF document.

fill-pdf-acroform-from-xml.title: Fill PDF AcroForm Fields from XML using XPath
fill-pdf-acroform-from-xml.description: Shows how to load an XML file, locate values with XPath, and populate AcroForm fields in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form.

add-green-circle-annotation.title: Add Green Circle Annotation to PDF Page
add-green-circle-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a circle annotation with a green fill color and a 3 pt border to the second page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-file-attachment-to-pdf__v2.title: Add File Attachment to PDF using PdfContentEditor
add-file-attachment-to-pdf__v2.description: Demonstrates how to attach an external file to an existing PDF document using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor facade and save the result as a new PDF.

add-memory-stream-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add Memory Stream Attachment to PDF using PdfContentEditor
add-memory-stream-attachment-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF (if missing) and embedding an in‑memory stream as a file attachment with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

attach-multiple-files-to-pdf.title: Attach Multiple Files to a PDF
attach-multiple-files-to-pdf.description: Shows how to attach several external files to an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor without creating visual annotations.

add-document-attachment-with-description.title: Add Document Attachment with Description to PDF
add-document-attachment-with-description.description: Demonstrates how to attach an external PDF file to an existing PDF and set a descriptive label using Aspose.Pdf.Facades PdfContentEditor.

add-attachment-with-custom-mime-type-to-.title: Add Attachment with Custom MIME Type to PDF
add-attachment-with-custom-mime-type-to-.description: Demonstrates how to embed a file into a PDF and specify a custom MIME type using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-all-attachments-from-pdf.title: Remove All Attachments from PDF
remove-all-attachments-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to delete every embedded attachment in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor and save the cleaned file.

add-document-attachment-preserve-existin.title: Add Document Attachment Without Deleting Existing Attachments
add-document-attachment-preserve-existin.description: Demonstrates how to add a new file attachment to an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor while keeping any previously attached files intact.

refresh-pdf-attachments.title: Refresh PDF Attachments by Removing and Adding Files
refresh-pdf-attachments.description: Demonstrates how to delete all existing attachments from a PDF and then add a new set of files using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

attach-downloaded-file-to-pdf.title: Attach a Downloaded File to a PDF
attach-downloaded-file-to-pdf.description: Shows how to download a file into a byte array and embed it as an attachment in an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

add-large-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add Large Attachment to PDF and Verify Memory Usage
add-large-attachment-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates adding a >10 MB attachment to an existing PDF using PdfContentEditor and checking that memory consumption stays within Aspose.Pdf limits.

add-and-verify-document-attachment.title: Add and Verify Document Attachment in PDF
add-and-verify-document-attachment.description: Demonstrates how to attach a file to a PDF using PdfContentEditor and then retrieve the attachment name with PdfExtractor for verification.

delete-all-attachments-verify-count.title: Delete All Attachments from PDF and Verify Count
delete-all-attachments-verify-count.description: Shows how to remove every attachment from a PDF using PdfContentEditor and then confirm that the attachment count is zero with PdfExtractor.

add-attachment-and-list-attachments.title: Add Attachment to PDF and List Attachments
add-attachment-and-list-attachments.description: Demonstrates how to embed a file as a document attachment using PdfContentEditor and then retrieve the list of attachment names with PdfExtractor.

add-unicode-attachment-description-to-pd.title: Add Unicode Attachment Description to PDF and Verify
add-unicode-attachment-description-to-pd.description: Demonstrates adding a file attachment with a Unicode description to an existing PDF and then extracting the attachment information to confirm proper encoding.

add-embedded-file-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add Embedded File Attachment to PDF
add-embedded-file-attachment-to-pdf.description: Shows how to embed a file into an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor without creating a visible annotation.

add-attachment-store-checksum-metadata.title: Add Attachment and Store Checksum in PDF Metadata
add-attachment-store-checksum-metadata.description: Shows how to embed a file into a PDF, retrieve its MD5 checksum, and write that checksum as custom metadata using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

encrypt-attachment-and-add-to-pdf.title: Encrypt Attachment and Add to PDF
encrypt-attachment-and-add-to-pdf.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF file with a password using PdfFileSecurity and then attach the encrypted file to another PDF with PdfContentEditor for added security.

add-and-verify-attachment-in-pdf.title: Add and Verify Attachment in PDF
add-and-verify-attachment-in-pdf.description: Shows how to attach a file to a PDF with PdfContentEditor, extract it using PdfExtractor, and compare the extracted bytes to the original file to confirm integrity.

enable-centerwindow-viewer-preference.title: Enable CenterWindow Viewer Preference for PDF
enable-centerwindow-viewer-preference.description: Demonstrates how to set the CenterWindow viewer preference so that a PDF opens centered on the screen using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

hide-menubar-viewer-preference.title: Hide Menu Bar Using PDF Viewer Preference
hide-menubar-viewer-preference.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to set the HideMenubar viewer preference so the PDF opens without a menu bar.

set-pdf-viewer-preference-fullscreen.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Full‑Screen Mode
set-pdf-viewer-preference-fullscreen.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to enable the full‑screen viewer preference for a PDF and save the updated document.

set-pdf-viewer-preference-show-outlines.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Show Outlines Panel
set-pdf-viewer-preference-show-outlines.description: Demonstrates how to configure the PDF viewer's PageMode to display the document outline panel by default using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

set-multiple-viewer-preferences-pdf.title: Set Multiple Viewer Preferences for a PDF
set-multiple-viewer-preferences-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to combine several viewer preferences (e.g., CenterWindow and HideToolbar) using bitwise OR and apply them to a PDF with the PdfContentEditor facade before saving.

retrieve-pdf-viewer-preferences.title: Retrieve PDF Viewer Preferences
retrieve-pdf-viewer-preferences.description: Demonstrates how to read the viewer preference flags from a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf and output them to the console.

set-hide-menubar-viewer-preference.title: Set HideMenubar Viewer Preference in PDF
set-hide-menubar-viewer-preference.description: Shows how to read a PDF's current viewer preferences, enable the HideMenubar flag, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

change-pdf-viewer-preferences.title: Change PDF Viewer Preferences and Save to New File
change-pdf-viewer-preferences.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade to modify viewer preferences of an existing PDF and save the result to a new file.

export-pdf-to-memorystream.title: Export PDF to MemoryStream using PdfViewer
export-pdf-to-memorystream.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfViewer, optionally applying modifications, and saving the result directly to a MemoryStream for further processing.

hide-toolbar-using-pdfcontenteditor.title: Hide Toolbar Using PdfContentEditor
hide-toolbar-using-pdfcontenteditor.description: Demonstrates how to set the HideToolbar viewer preference on a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

hide-scrollbars-viewer-preference.title: Hide Scrollbars and UI Elements Using Viewer Preference
hide-scrollbars-viewer-preference.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to bind a PDF, set the HideWindowUI viewer preference, and save the result, providing a cleaner display on small‑screen devices.

set-pdf-window-title-displaydoctitle.title: Set PDF Window Title via DisplayDocTitle Viewer Preference
set-pdf-window-title-displaydoctitle.description: Demonstrates how to assign a title to a PDF and enable the DisplayDocTitle viewer preference so the title appears in the viewer's window caption.

extract-pdf-viewer-preferences-to-xml.title: Extract PDF Viewer Preferences and Save as XML
extract-pdf-viewer-preferences-to-xml.description: Loads a PDF with PdfContentEditor, retrieves the viewer preference flags, and writes them to an XML configuration file.

apply-viewer-preferences-from-json.title: Apply Viewer Preferences to PDFs from JSON Configuration
apply-viewer-preferences-from-json.description: Shows how to read a JSON file that lists PDF files and desired ViewerPreference flags, then apply those flags to each PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

hide-toolbar-and-menubar.title: Hide Toolbar and Menubar in PDF Viewer
hide-toolbar-and-menubar.description: Shows how to set viewer preferences to hide the toolbar and menu bar of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

retrieve-pdf-viewer-preferences__v2.title: Retrieve PDF Viewer Preferences After Incremental Edits
retrieve-pdf-viewer-preferences__v2.description: Demonstrates how to change PDF viewer preferences using PdfContentEditor and retrieve the current preference value after each modification to verify incremental updates.

set-pdf-viewer-preference-single-page.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Single‑Page Layout
set-pdf-viewer-preference-single-page.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to change a PDF's viewer preference to single‑page layout and save the modified document.

configure-continuous-view-mode.title: Configure Continuous View Mode for PDF
configure-continuous-view-mode.description: Demonstrates how to set the viewer preference to continuous (single column) layout using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor and save the updated PDF.

toggle-pdf-viewer-preferences.title: Toggle PDF Viewer Preferences with Aspose.Pdf
toggle-pdf-viewer-preferences.description: The example reads a PDF's current viewer preferences, presents them as toggleable options, modifies selected flags, and saves the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

toggle-fullscreen-viewer-preference.title: Toggle FullScreen Viewer Preference in PDF
toggle-fullscreen-viewer-preference.description: Shows how to enable or disable the FullScreen viewer preference of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor and related APIs.

apply-viewer-preferences-to-encrypted-pd.title: Apply Viewer Preferences to an Encrypted PDF
apply-viewer-preferences-to-encrypted-pd.description: Decrypts an encrypted PDF using the owner password, sets viewer preferences such as hiding the menu bar and toolbar, and saves the modified document.

extract-pdf-viewer-preferences-to-xml__v.title: Extract PDF Viewer Preferences and Export to XML
extract-pdf-viewer-preferences-to-xml__v.description: Demonstrates how to read viewer preference flags from a PDF using PdfContentEditor and serialize the set flags into an XML document for legacy system integration.

set-pdf-viewer-preference-use-none.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Hide Navigation Panels
set-pdf-viewer-preference-use-none.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to set the viewer preference PageModeUseNone, which hides all navigation panels when the PDF is opened.

add-text-annotation-to-pdf-page.title: Add Text Annotation to PDF Page
add-text-annotation-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to create a PDF and add a sticky‑note text annotation at specific coordinates on the first page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-web-link-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Web Link Annotation to PDF
add-web-link-annotation-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a clickable link annotation that opens an external website using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

add-image-stamp-to-pdf-page__v2.title: Add Image Stamp to Specific PDF Page
add-image-stamp-to-pdf-page__v2.description: Shows how to create an image‑based stamp using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and apply it only to the second page of a PDF document.

add-free-text-annotation-helvetica.title: Add Free‑Text Annotation with Helvetica Font
add-free-text-annotation-helvetica.description: Demonstrates how to add a free‑text annotation to a PDF page using Helvetica, size 12, and blue color, and save the result via the PdfContentEditor facade.

add-highlight-annotation-to-pdf-page__v2.title: Add Highlight Annotation to PDF Page
add-highlight-annotation-to-pdf-page__v2.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to create a yellow highlight markup annotation on a specific page of a PDF document.

underline-specific-phrase-on-pdf-page.title: Underline Specific Phrase on PDF Page
underline-specific-phrase-on-pdf-page.description: Shows how to locate a given phrase on the fourth page of a PDF and add an underline annotation using Aspose.Pdf's Facades API.

add-square-annotation-red-border.title: Add Square Annotation with Red Border to PDF Page
add-square-annotation-red-border.description: Demonstrates how to place a square annotation with a red border and semi‑transparent fill on the fifth page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-thick-green-circle-annotation-page-s.title: Add Thick Green Circle Annotation to PDF Page Six
add-thick-green-circle-annotation-page-s.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor facade to place a circle annotation with a thick green outline around a diagram on page six of a PDF and save the modified file.

add-line-annotation-with-arrowheads.title: Add Line Annotation with Arrowheads to PDF
add-line-annotation-with-arrowheads.description: Shows how to bind a PDF, create a line annotation with arrowheads at both ends, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-popup-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Popup Annotation to PDF on Hover
add-popup-annotation-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert a popup annotation that appears when the user hovers over it using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

batch-add-text-annotations-to-pdf.title: Batch Add Text Annotations to PDF
batch-add-text-annotations-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates defining a collection of annotation specifications and adding them to a PDF document in a loop using Aspose.Pdf.

add-semi-transparent-stamp-annotation.title: Add Semi-Transparent Stamp Annotation to PDF
add-semi-transparent-stamp-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to bind a PDF page as a stamp, set its opacity to 0.5, and apply it as an annotation to another PDF document.

add-text-annotation-with-opacity.title: Add Text Annotation with Opacity to PDF
add-text-annotation-with-opacity.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a TextAnnotation with 75% opacity, adding it to the first page, and saving the modified document.

rotate-text-annotation-90-degrees.title: Rotate Text Annotation by 90 Degrees in PDF
rotate-text-annotation-90-degrees.description: Shows how to create a text annotation (stamp) in a PDF, set its rotation to 90 degrees, and place it on a page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

custom-appearance-rubber-stamp.title: Create Custom Appearance Rubber Stamp Annotation
custom-appearance-rubber-stamp.description: Shows how to add a rubber‑stamp annotation to a PDF page using a custom appearance stream taken from another PDF file via PdfContentEditor.

add-square-annotation-with-custom-border.title: Add Square Annotation with Custom Border to PDF
add-square-annotation-with-custom-border.description: Demonstrates how to add a square annotation to a PDF page and set a custom border thickness of three points for better visibility using Aspose.Pdf.

create-dashed-border-rectangle-annotatio.title: Create Dashed Border Rectangle Annotation
create-dashed-border-rectangle-annotatio.description: Demonstrates how to add a square (rectangle) annotation with a dashed border to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-light-gray-background-to-text-annota.title: Add Light Gray Background to Text Annotation
add-light-gray-background-to-text-annota.description: Demonstrates using PdfAnnotationEditor to place a TextAnnotation with a light gray background on a PDF page.

rotate-stamp-annotation-90-degrees.title: Rotate Stamp Annotation 90° Clockwise
rotate-stamp-annotation-90-degrees.description: Demonstrates how to apply an image stamp to a PDF and rotate it 90 degrees clockwise using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-file-attachment-annotation.title: Add File Attachment Annotation to PDF
add-file-attachment-annotation.description: Shows how to create a file‑attachment annotation on a PDF page that opens the attached file when clicked, using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

add-javascript-alert-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add JavaScript Alert Annotation to PDF
add-javascript-alert-annotation-to-pdf.description: Shows how to bind a PDF, define a clickable rectangle, and attach a JavaScript action that displays an alert when the annotation is activated using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

add-tooltip-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Tooltip Annotation to PDF
add-tooltip-annotation-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a sticky‑note annotation with a tooltip that appears when the mouse hovers over the area using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-dashed-line-annotation.title: Add Dashed Line Annotation with Custom Pattern to PDF
add-dashed-line-annotation.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to create a line annotation with a custom dash pattern on a PDF page.

add-popup-annotation-with-bullet-points.title: Add Popup Annotation with Bullet Points to PDF
add-popup-annotation-with-bullet-points.description: Demonstrates how to insert a multi‑line popup annotation containing bullet‑point comments into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

rotate-stamp-diagonal.title: Rotate Stamp Annotation Diagonally
rotate-stamp-diagonal.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a text stamp, setting a 45‑degree rotation, and applying the stamp using the PdfFileStamp facade.

add-rtl-text-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Right-to-Left Text Annotation to PDF
add-rtl-text-annotation-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a right‑to‑left (Arabic) text annotation into an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to verify Unicode rendering.

add-hyperlink-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Hyperlink Annotation to PDF Page
add-hyperlink-annotation-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a local hyperlink annotation that jumps to a specific page within the same PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

set-highlight-annotation-border-color-re.title: Set Highlight Annotation Border Color to Red
set-highlight-annotation-border-color-re.description: Shows how to add a highlight annotation to a PDF page and set its border color to bright red using Aspose.Pdf and the PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

add-freetext-annotation-html.title: Add Free‑Text Annotation with HTML to PDF
add-freetext-annotation-html.description: Demonstrates how to insert a free‑text annotation containing rich HTML content into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

custom-annotation-appearance-stream.title: Create Custom Annotation Appearance Stream with Rubber Stamp
custom-annotation-appearance-stream.description: Demonstrates how to add a rubber‑stamp annotation with a custom appearance stream that draws a red rectangle using PDF drawing operators.

add-text-annotation-with-author-metadata.title: Add Text Annotation with Author Metadata to PDF
add-text-annotation-with-author-metadata.description: Shows how to place a text (note) annotation on a PDF page using PdfContentEditor and store the author information in the annotation's title.

add-text-annotation-with-utc-creation-da.title: Add Text Annotation with UTC Creation Date
add-text-annotation-with-utc-creation-da.description: Demonstrates binding a PDF with PdfAnnotationEditor, creating a TextAnnotation, setting its CreationDate to the current UTC time, and saving the updated document.

add-text-annotation-set-subject.title: Add Text Annotation and Set Subject in PDF
add-text-annotation-set-subject.description: Demonstrates creating a sticky‑note (text) annotation on a PDF page using PdfContentEditor and then assigning a Subject to that annotation via the TextAnnotation class.

lock-text-annotation-in-pdf.title: Lock a Text Annotation in a PDF
lock-text-annotation-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a text annotation, set its Locked flag, and save the PDF using both the Document API and the PdfAnnotationEditor facade to prevent end‑user edits.

hide-annotations-in-fullscreen-mode.title: Hide Annotations When PDF Opens in FullScreen Mode
hide-annotations-in-fullscreen-mode.description: Demonstrates how to detect the FullScreen viewer preference using PdfContentEditor and set all annotation flags to Hidden for a cleaner display.

replace-draft-with-final-in-pdf.title: Replace "Draft" with "Final" in a PDF
replace-draft-with-final-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade to replace all occurrences of a specific word in a PDF document and save the result.

replace-text-on-page-preserve-font-style.title: Replace Text on Specific PDF Page While Preserving Font Style
replace-text-on-page-preserve-font-style.description: Demonstrates how to replace a given string on page two of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, while keeping the original font, size, and color of the text.

replace-text-using-regex-across-pdf-page.title: Replace Text Using Regular Expressions Across PDF Pages
replace-text-using-regex-across-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to replace text that matches a regular expression on all pages of a PDF while preserving the original formatting using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-text-on-specific-pdf-page.title: Replace Text on Specific PDF Page
replace-text-on-specific-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to replace a given string only on page 3 of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

replace-phrase-with-bold-text.title: Replace Phrase with Bold Text in PDF
replace-phrase-with-bold-text.description: Shows how to replace a specific phrase in a PDF with a new phrase while applying bold formatting and preserving the original font size using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

insert-blank-page-add-header.title: Insert Blank Page and Add Header to PDF
insert-blank-page-add-header.description: Shows how to insert a new blank page at a specific position in a PDF and add a header annotation to all pages using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

delete-page-from-pdf.title: Delete a Specific Page from PDF
delete-page-from-pdf.description: Shows how to remove page 5 from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and save the updated file.

move-last-page-to-beginning.title: Move Last Page to Beginning of PDF
move-last-page-to-beginning.description: Shows how to reorder PDF pages by extracting the last page and inserting it at the start using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-text-annotation-and-merge-pdfs.title: Add Text Annotation and Merge PDFs
add-text-annotation-and-merge-pdfs.description: Loads a PDF, adds a text annotation to its first page, saves the edited file, and then concatenates it with a second PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.

split-pdf-into-single-page-files.title: Split PDF into Single-Page Files with Annotations
split-pdf-into-single-page-files.description: Shows how to split an edited PDF into separate one‑page PDF files while preserving all annotations using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

insert-image-with-caption-annotation.title: Insert Image with Caption Annotation into PDF
insert-image-with-caption-annotation.description: Shows how to add an image at specific coordinates in a PDF and place a text annotation as a caption underneath using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

add-image-attachment-and-stamp.title: Add Image Attachment and Stamp to PDF
add-image-attachment-and-stamp.description: Shows how to embed an image file as a document attachment and then place the same image as a stamp annotation on each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf facades.

add-image-watermark-to-pdfs.title: Add Image Watermark to PDFs in a Folder
add-image-watermark-to-pdfs.description: Shows how to apply an image watermark to every PDF file in a directory using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and save the watermarked files to an output folder.

batch-add-annotations-from-json.title: Batch Add Annotations to PDF from JSON
batch-add-annotations-from-json.description: Demonstrates how to read a JSON definition file and programmatically add various annotation types (text, highlight, link, etc.) to specific pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdf-with-attachment-and-viewer-p.title: Encrypt PDF with Attachment and Viewer Preference
encrypt-pdf-with-attachment-and-viewer-p.description: Shows how to add a document attachment, set a viewer preference, and then encrypt the PDF with user and owner passwords using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

decrypt-edit-reencrypt-pdf.title: Decrypt, Edit, and Re‑encrypt a Password‑Protected PDF
decrypt-edit-reencrypt-pdf.description: The example shows how to open a PDF protected with a user password, decrypt it, modify its content by adding a text fragment, and then re‑encrypt the document with AES‑256 and specific permissions.

add-file-attachment-to-encrypted-pdf.title: Add File Attachment to Encrypted PDF
add-file-attachment-to-encrypted-pdf.description: Demonstrates opening a password‑protected PDF, adding a file attachment without a visual annotation, and saving the updated document.

batch-add-attachment-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add Attachment to Multiple PDFs
batch-add-attachment-to-pdfs.description: Shows how to iterate over a collection of PDF files and add the same file attachment to each document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

apply-viewer-preferences-to-multiple-pdf.title: Apply Viewer Preferences to Multiple PDFs
apply-viewer-preferences-to-multiple-pdf.description: Shows how to iterate over a collection of PDF files and set common viewer preferences using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

add-watermark-to-pdfs-in-parallel.title: Add Watermark to PDFs in Parallel
add-watermark-to-pdfs-in-parallel.description: Shows how to apply a text watermark to multiple PDF files concurrently using Aspose.Pdf Facade classes.

batch-remove-attachments-add-disclaimer-.title: Batch Remove Attachments and Add Disclaimer Annotation
batch-remove-attachments-add-disclaimer-.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over PDF files, delete all embedded attachments using PdfContentEditor, and add a standardized disclaimer as a text annotation on the first page.

pdf-pipeline-attachments-viewer-preferen.title: Configuration‑Driven PDF Pipeline: Attachments, Viewer Preferences, and Annotations
pdf-pipeline-attachments-viewer-preferen.description: Demonstrates a configurable pipeline that adds file attachments, modifies viewer preferences, and inserts various annotations into a PDF using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades API.

add-attachment-set-viewer-preference.title: Add Attachment and Set Viewer Preference
add-attachment-set-viewer-preference.description: Demonstrates adding a file attachment to a PDF without a visible annotation and configuring the viewer to show the attachment panel using the PdfContentEditor facade.

folder-pdf-monitor-add-text.title: Folder PDF Monitor Adding Text Annotation

async-add-attachment-to-pdf.title: Asynchronously Add Attachment to PDF and Save
async-add-attachment-to-pdf.description: Shows how to attach a file to an existing PDF and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor on a background thread to keep the UI responsive.

add-large-attachment-to-pdf-buffered.title: Add Large Attachment to PDF with Buffered Stream
add-large-attachment-to-pdf-buffered.description: Demonstrates how to attach a large file to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor while buffering the file stream to minimize memory consumption.

add-file-attachment-with-retry.title: Add File Attachment to PDF with Retry on Network Timeout
add-file-attachment-with-retry.description: Shows how to download a file from a URL and attach it to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor, with retry logic to handle HttpClient timeout errors.

validate-pdf-integrity-after-adding-marg.title: Validate PDF Integrity After Adding Margins
validate-pdf-integrity-after-adding-marg.description: The example computes SHA‑256 hashes of a PDF before and after applying margins with PdfFileEditor, then compares the hashes to verify that the document was modified.

compare-pdf-file-sizes-after-editing.title: Compare PDF File Sizes After Editing
compare-pdf-file-sizes-after-editing.description: Shows how to add a blank page to a PDF, save the edited file, and compare the original and edited file sizes to confirm that changes were applied.

export-pdf-annotations-to-json.title: Export PDF Annotations to JSON via XFDF
export-pdf-annotations-to-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF, extract all annotations with PdfAnnotationEditor, convert them to XFDF, and embed the XFDF XML in a JSON file for external analysis.

verify-pdf-attachment-after-save.title: Verify PDF Attachment After Save
verify-pdf-attachment-after-save.description: Demonstrates adding a file attachment to a PDF with PdfContentEditor, saving the document, and confirming the attachment exists using PdfExtractor in a unit test.

persist-viewer-preferences-in-pdf.title: Persist Viewer Preferences in PDF
persist-viewer-preferences-in-pdf.description: Shows how to set viewer preferences on a PDF, save it, reopen it, and verify that the preferences are persisted using Aspose.Pdf.

verify-text-annotation-position.title: Verify Text Annotation Position on PDF Page
verify-text-annotation-position.description: Shows how to add a text (sticky‑note) annotation to a PDF with PdfContentEditor and assert its rectangle coordinates in a unit test.

log-pdf-edit-operations.title: Log PDF Edit Operations with PdfContentEditor
log-pdf-edit-operations.description: Shows how to edit a PDF (replace text and add a web link) using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor while logging each operation with timestamps to a text file.

add-document-attachment-with-error-handl.title: Add Document Attachment to PDF with Error Handling
add-document-attachment-with-error-handl.description: Demonstrates how to attach an external file to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor while checking for missing source or attachment files and handling exceptions.

replace-text-pdf-content-editor-disposal.title: Replace Text in PDF with PdfContentEditor and Ensure Proper Disposal
replace-text-pdf-content-editor-disposal.description: Demonstrates how to replace text in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor and guarantees the editor is closed in a finally block to prevent memory leaks.

replace-text-pdf-using-pdfcontenteditor.title: Replace Text in PDF Using PdfContentEditor with Automatic Disposal
replace-text-pdf-using-pdfcontenteditor.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, replacing all occurrences of a string, and saving the edited file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor inside a using block for proper disposal.

pdfcontenteditor-wrapper-text-replace-at.title: PdfContentEditor Wrapper for Text Replacement and Attachments
pdfcontenteditor-wrapper-text-replace-at.description: Shows a lightweight wrapper around Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor that loads a PDF, replaces text globally or per page, adds a file attachment, and saves the result.

add-text-stamp-with-shadow.title: Add Text Stamp with Shadow to First PDF Page
add-text-stamp-with-shadow.description: Demonstrates how to place a text stamp with a shadow effect at the top of the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.
